title: Lav Turkish Tea Cups and Saucers Set - 12-Piece Authentic Tea Glasses Set With Gold Rim for Tea Time
features: MAKE TEA TIME ENJOYABLE - Enjoy morning, afternoon, or evening tea with our deluxe turkish tea cups and saucer set! LAV turkish tea glasses with gold rim are durable and stylish, making tea time a joy for all
MIDDLE EASTERN DESIGN- Inspired from the lively gold color of the Middle Eastern arabic style, the tea cup and saucer set is a chic way to serve tea to your family and friends

SET OF 12 - Turkish tea cups set includes 6 glasses and 6 saucers, enough for a family tea time, or tea time with friends. LAV eco friendly glass tea set brings people together and encourages family time!
GREAT CHOICE FOR GIFT- Turkish tea glasses with saucers are a great gift choice for your loved ones for their birthdays

ECO FRIENDLY - All LAV products come out of one of the most efficient glassware facilities globally. We're conscious of the packagings and know that improper packaging puts immense pressure on ecology. Therefore we use +95% recycled and completely recyclable materials. So any LAV product you would order from these pages is environment-friendly, 100% recyclable, and has a positive impact on our future.
description: TURKISH TEA TIME WITH A COMPLETE SET - Bring the family together for a morning, afternoon, or evening tea time! Turkish tea cups and saucer set were expertly designed for smooth drinking, bringing out the taste of every sip! LAV turkish tea set comes in a complete tea cups set of 6, each holding 4oz. Our clear tea cups feature a prominent gold rim, showing off the classic, traditional design. You can use LAV glass tea set anytime of the day for a great break!
